subcodes.first_line: O 'Ináyat! Though We made mention of thee in the Tablet that was revealed especially for the Leaf, yet this is a further bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عنایت اگرچه ذکر ترا در لوحی که مخصوص ورقه نازل شده نمودیم ولکن فضل آخر
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @thankfulness; gratitude
